programs.title: Bargain Block
programs.desc: Keith and Evan buy a home littered with debris and branches. However, Keith finds a few treasures that inspire him to create a forest-chic design.

programs.title: House Hunters
programs.desc: A newlywed couple faces cultural and style differences as they search for their first home together in Maryland.

programs.title: Flip Or Flop
programs.desc: Tarek and Christina are offered the chance to split a flip, but it is difficult to work with competitors.

programs.title: Down Home Fab
programs.desc: Chelsea and Cole take on tall dentists who aren't afraid to go bold. They push the boundaries with a modern-industrial kitchen and living room.

programs.title: Renovation Face-Off
programs.desc: It's Help! I Wrecked My House vs. Fix My Flip as Page Turner and Jasmine Roth go head-to-head in the competition for the best creative open concept.

programs.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programs.desc: With one of the biggest budgets ever, David helps former housekeepers find a $5 million luxury vacation home in Costa Rica.
